creator: empty.japan
caption:
While some of the most famous tourist spots remain overcrowded, there are a ton of lesser-known places that are just as magnificent and completely empty. 

They are about to become abandoned and shut down because—surprise, surprise!—their main source of income comes from tourists (both local and foreign). 

If you have ever traveled around Japan by car or done some backpacking or hiking, you probably know what I mean: deserted Temples and Shrines, abandoned shops, hotels, and rest stops. If you enjoyed Japan during your first visit, give it a try a second time, visit some of the lesser-known locations, because each one of them feels so different with its own foody specialties, festivals, and amazingly kind locals who will greet you with a smile 🥹❤️

transcription.text: Do, do, do, do, do, do, do...
